proposal_summary: The proposal requests the Uniswap DAO to match the 1M ARB grant received from the Arbitrum LTIPP by allocating $750k in UNI. These funds will be distributed alongside the LTIPP grant to incentivize liquidity providers on Uniswap via Gauntlet's dynamic optimization engine.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Match Arbitrum LTIPP incentives by allocating $750k in UNI
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Allocates $750,000 worth of UNI to be matched alongside the ARB grant to incentivize liquidity providers.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The snapshot finished with the winner being $750k, hence we will move forward with this being the amount proposed. We will use the price of $9.74 per UNI for calculations.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal describes straightforward allocation of funds to match the Arbitrum LTIPP grant to be managed by a previously established entity structure.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: If any funds are approved, they will follow a similar distribution structure and execution as above and be grouped together in Gauntlet’s incentives allocation.

limitations: No target address is explicitly provided for the UNI treasury transfer, though the funds will likely go to the disclosed multisig.
The exact on-chain payload is missing from the proposal description, only off-chain decisions and addresses are presented.
